overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy riding a dapple gray horse through overcast prairie grasslands. The character travels along a winding dirt trail, passing scattered pine trees and rocky outcrops, and overtakes a horse-drawn wagon. The atmosphere is calm and exploratory with diffused natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: riding a dapple gray horse at a steady canter along a winding dirt trail through tall grass prairie

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through tall grass
dense green grass flanking both sides of the trail
scattered evergreen trees dotting the rolling landscape
large rocky outcrops visible on the horizon
prominent leafless tree with gnarled branches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy riding through an expansive prairie landscape. The trail winds through tall green grass with scattered pine trees and rocky formations visible in the distance under an overcast sky. The camera maintains a steady following position as the horse trots along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with approaching rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: accelerating slightly to overtake a horse-drawn wagon on the left side of the trail

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon moving slowly along the trail, being overtaken by the player

segments.scene_description: The rider continues along the prairie trail as rocky outcrops grow larger in the distance. A horse-drawn wagon appears on the left and is overtaken around the 40-second mark. The landscape remains open with scattered trees, and the trail surface shows signs of wear from wagon wheels.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail approaching rocky hills with fence remnants

events.description: trail curves right toward rocky terrain, wooden fence ruins appear on right

agents.ego_description: following the curving trail toward rocky formations, passing weathered wooden fence posts

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts and broken rails along the right side of the trail
large rocky hill dominating the path ahead with steep slopes

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the rider continuing along the winding trail as it curves toward rocky hills. Weathered wooden fence remnants appear on the right side, suggesting old ranch boundaries. The wagon is now behind, and the path ahead splits near the rocky outcrops under the persistent overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive prairie landscape that gradually narrows as it approaches rugged rocky hills. It begins with a steady following view of a cowboy trotting along a winding trail through tall green grass and scattered pine trees under an overcast sky. As the rider progresses, the distant rocky outcrops grow larger and more prominent, and the camera captures the moment the rider overtakes a horse-drawn wagon on the worn dirt path. The scene then shifts as the trail curves toward the hills, passing weathered wooden fence remnants that suggest old ranch boundaries. Finally, the path splits near the rocky formations, leaving the wagon behind as the rider moves deeper into the hilly terrain.
